mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM product
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND category_id IN (SELECT id FROM product_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} OR parent_id = #{categoryId})
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY price ASC ORDER BY price DESC ORDER BY sales DESC ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, original_price, stock, status, category_id, main_image, sales, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{categoryId}, #{mainImage}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
